subcodes.first_line: Jamal Pasha was as a mountain of pride; whithersoever he went, he raised the gallows, and whomsoever he desired, he condemned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال پاشا کوهی از غرور بود هر کجا میرفت دار بپا میکرد و هر که را میخواست
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @oneness; unity of religion, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat], @stories; anecdotes
